log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Half-Elf — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Half-Elf — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Half-Elf — Armored Tank.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 15 necrotic damage (half).
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Half-Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 32/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
--- Half-Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 4/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (4/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Half-Elf — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Half-Elf — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
